title: angelica major
intro: Angelica major, also known as grand angelica or archangel, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of angelica major include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce stress. Angelica major is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to ease menstrual cramps and promote relaxation.
